data.title: Palantir Co-Founder Peter Thiel Says America Needs 'Drastic Reset' With China, But So Do Others
data.description: Peter Thiel calls for a major reset in US-China economic ties, citing China's significant role in trade deficit. He also highlights the strategic risks often overlooked in economic discussions.

data.title: Goldman Sachs, M&T Bank And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Monday
Mark Cuban Examines Trump's Tariff Exemptions Rationale On Electronics: 'That's Billions Of Revenue For The USA'
data.description: Mark Cuban addressed President Donald Trump's tariff exemption strategy on electronics, suggesting it could generate billions in revenue.

data.title: Intel Gave Up On Bitcoin Mining Chip Business Nearly 2 Years Ago — Here's How Its Stock Has Fared Compared With BTC Since Then
data.description: Leading chip manufacturer Intel Corp. (NASDAQ:INTC) entered the Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mining hardware market with its Blockscale chip line but ended it after only a year of operation.

data.title: Elizabeth Warren Reiterates Congress Can End Trump's 'Red-Light, Green-Light' Tariff Chaos: 'All We Have To Do Is…'
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren urged Congress to revoke Donald Trump's emergency tariff powers, calling his shifting trade policies "chaos and corruption" that threaten economic stability and investor confidence.
